# Codex Unleashed

Codex Unleashed is a public fork of OpenAI Codex CLI that installs as
`codex-unleashed` and stores user state in `~/.codex-unleashed`. It preserves a
depth-first 0.87-era terminal workflow while keeping current model discovery and
explicit model/reasoning choices.

## Key files

- `README.md`: project overview and install commands.
- `docs/README.md`: documentation index.
- `docs/rationale.md`: why the fork exists and what tradeoffs it preserves.
- `docs/install.md`: npm and source installation.
- `docs/config.md`: configuration and state-home behavior.
- `docs/npm-publishing.md`: maintainer release workflow for
  `@lpalbou/codex-unleashed`.
- `codex-cli/package.json`: npm package metadata.
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`: public CI.
- `.github/workflows/docs.yml`: GitHub Pages docs generation.
- `.github/workflows/native-artifacts.yml`: manual native binary artifacts.
- `.github/workflows/npm-publish-codex-unleashed.yml`: manual npm release flow.
